calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2011 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2010 Continued To Jan-21-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-30-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amanda L. Ebey, Esq. appeared with plaintiffs Esther Juarez, Leticia Martinez, Thelma S. Montes and Alicia Payne, who were placed under oath and examined. Ms. Ebey also appeared for plaintiffs Eduardo Juarez, II and Carlos Garcia, who were not present at today's hearing.
Defaults were entered against defendants Jorge Martine De Anda and Jorge De Anda, Jr., on September 14, 2010.
Dismisssals without prejudice as to defendants Dominque De Anda and Dolores De Anda were filed today, November 30, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, November 30, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Esther Juarez, Leticia Martinez, Thelma S. Montes, Eduardo Juarez, II, Alicia Payne and Carlos Garcia, and against the Defaulted Defendants Jorge Martin De Anda and Jorge De Anda, Jr. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $255,000.00.
Costs - $545.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $255,545.00.

The Court further Orders that plaintiffs Esther Juarez, Leticia Martinez, Thelma S. Montes, Eduardo Juarez, II, Alicia Payne and Carlos Garcia shall have immediate possession of the premises located @ 1051 Shotwell St., San Francisco, CA, and a writ of possession shall issue against defendants Jorge Martin De Anda and Jorge De Anda, Jr.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2010 Continued To Dec-03-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
